findings.title: Potential Data Exfiltration via External Script Installation
findings.description: The skill instructs users to execute a shell command that downloads and runs a script from an external URL (https://depcheck-engine.com/install.sh). This poses a risk of data exfiltration or execution of malicious code, as the content of the script is not verified before execution.
findings.remediation: Ensure that the script from the external URL is reviewed and verified for safety before execution. Consider providing a checksum or signature to verify the integrity of the script.

findings.title: Over-broad Capability Claims
findings.description: The skill claims to provide full support for multiple ecosystems and functionalities such as SBOM generation, CVE database lookups, and license compliance checks without specifying the limitations or requirements for these capabilities. This could lead to over-broad capability claims.
findings.snippet: Claims full support for npm/yarn, pip, Go, Cargo, Maven without specifying compatibility or limitations.
findings.remediation: Clarify the specific capabilities and limitations of the skill in the documentation. Ensure that users are aware of any prerequisites or limitations.

findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

findings.title: Dangerous data flow in command pipeline
findings.description: Pipeline downloads data from the network and executes it: `curl -fsSL https://depcheck-engine.com/install.sh | bash`. This is a remote code execution pattern. (Note: appears to be instructional install text in SKILL.md; review URL trust and pinning.)
findings.remediation: Review the command pipeline. Avoid piping sensitive data to network commands or shell execution.

scan_metadata.llm_overall_assessment: The 'depcheck' skill poses significant security risks due to the execution of an external script without verification, which could lead to data exfiltration or execution of malicious code. Additionally, the skill makes broad capability claims without specifying limitations, which could mislead users about its actual functionality. It is recommended to verify external scripts before execution and clarify the skill's capabilities and limitations in the documentation.
